query:
SELECT lu.id, lu.display_name, lu.line_user_id, s.plan, s.status 
FROM line_users lu 
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.user_id = lu.id
WHERE lu.display_name LIKE '%高橋%' 
   OR lu.display_name LIKE '%まき%' 
   OR lu.display_name LIKE '%舞%'
ORDER BY lu.display_name;
